StringData.String: (1) We want you to do this. Now.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
(2) We want you to do this. Now.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
(3) We want you to do this. Now.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
(4) We want you to do this. Now.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
We Will, We Will Shock You.
(5) We want you to do this. Now.
This is an awesome objective: use 1 FTW.
Workers help you craft bombs and potions for battle
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Assign the worker to craft potions in the apothecary
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Use gold to unlock the greater health potion in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 greater health potions using the apothecary
Win weapons and armor in combat or buy premium versions from the store, then equip them on your hero to increase your might
Drag a new weapon to its slot using the inventory menu
Drag a new suit of armor to its slot using the inventory menu
By adding more workers, you'll be able to craft more bombs and potions
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Assign the worker to craft bombs in the alchemy lab
Build an alchemy lab to craft powerful bombs for use in battle
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Craft 10 shard bombs using the alchemy lab
Mana potions allow you to use powerful skills in combat, so unlocking the ability to craft them is essential
Use gold to unlock them in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 mana potions using the apothecary
Personalize your hero to make them stand out among your allies by clicking on the "view your character" icon
Give your hero a name worthy of "legendary" status
Your hero will shout a warcry when landing a critical hit
Your friends will see your castle name whenever they visit
Infirmaries allow you to crafts kits that aid your allies in battle
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Craft 10 injury kits using the infirmary
Fire bombs will burn away your enemies' mana
Use gold to unlock them in the alchemy lab crafting menu
Craft 10 fire bombs using the alchemy lab
The more real-life friends you have playing Dragon Age Legends, the more fun you'll have!
Add a friend to your guild
Open the Guild screen via the main menu
Open the Guild screen via the main menu
Use your friends in combat as allies
Customize your hero's appearance by clicking on the "view your character" icon and then selecting "Edit Hero"
Make sure you explore both hair and face options
Shock bombs deal damage to all enemies
Use gold to unlock them in the alchemy lab crafting menu
Craft 10 shock bombs using the alchemy lab
Visit your friends' castles to see what they've built and collect gold
Click on a friend in your friend bar, then on the castle icon
Friends who have gold for you are noted in the friend bar
Buy premium gear from the store, and sell your extra items to earn gold!
Use your gold to make a purchase in the store
Drag an item from your inventory to the sell icon to receive gold
Increase your inventory space to carry more items at once
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Frost bombs will prevent enemies from taking action for a number of turns
Use gold to unlock them in the alchemy lab crafting menu
Craft 10 frost bombs using the alchemy lab
Antidote kits cure your allies of poison and restore some health
Use gold to unlock them in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 antidote kits using the infirmary
Customize your castle's appearance by clicking on the "view your character" icon and then selecting "Edit Castle"
Furnaces increase the productivity of adjacent rooms, meaning you can craft more items at once
Use gold to unlock the furnace via the throne room
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Upgrade the productivity of 2 rooms via their crafting menus
Building a second alchemy lab will allow you to craft more bombs at once
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Craft 10 grease bombs using the alchemy lab
Concentration potions increase your chance to land a critical hit
Use gold to unlock them in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 concentration potions using the apothecary
Your quest to reach Lukesh and Ravi's son continues in the Planasene Forest
Click on the Planasene Forest region via the world map
Battle Poultices temporarily increase the attack and luck stats of one of your allies
Use gold to unlock them in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 battle poultices using the infirmary
Poison bombs damage affected enemies each turn
Use gold to unlock them in the alchemy lab crafting menu
Craft 10 poison bombs using the alchemy lab
Upgrading your storehouse will allow you to carry even more items at once
Mouse over your storehouse and click the arrow icon
The Throne Room allows you to unlock useful new castle rooms
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Bombs can help turn the tide in your favor, so use them often
Mana potions are essential for combat, so make sure you keep crafting them
Have your workers craft 50 mana potions
Make sure you take advantage of your skills during battle; they can often be the key to victory
When leveling up, choose to upgrade an existing skill
Shock bombs are highly effective against large groups of enemies
Have your workers craft 50 shock bombs
Taverns increase the happiness of adjacent worker rooms, meaning you can craft items faster
Use gold to unlock the tavern via the throne room
Make sure you place it next to at least one worker room
Greater mana potions refill more mana per use
Use gold to unlock the greater mana potion in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 greater mana potions using the apothecary
Use 5 greater mana potions potions during battle
Defense potions significantly boost your defense stat
Use gold to unlock the defense potion in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 defense potions using the apothecary
The treasury automatically collects your friend gold from other castles
Use gold to unlock the treasury via the throne room
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Assign a worker to collect your friend gold
Power potions significantly boost your attack stat
Use gold to unlock them in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 power potions using the apothecary
Acid bombs temporarily lower the defense of all enemies
Use gold to unlock them in the alchemy lab crafting menu
Craft 10 acid bombs using the alchemy lab
Agility potions significantly boost your agility stat, giving you more turns in combat and increasing your chance to dodge
Use gold to unlock the agility potion in the apothecary crafting menu
Craft 10 agility potions using the apothecary
Add new workers to your castle by purchasing additional worker rooms
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Bracing kits cure your allies of crippled and restore some health
Use gold to unlock them in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 bracing kits using the infirmary
Expanding your great hall allows you to add even more friends to your guild
Mouse over your great hall and click the arrow icon
Team mana salves add mana to every member of your party
Use gold to unlock team mana salves in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 team mana salves using the infirmary
Use 5 team mana salves during battle
Bombs can help turn the tide in your favor, so use them often
Room upgrades improve the overall benefits your castle provides, so save up gold and upgrade often
Build a great hall so that you can add more friends to your guild
Use gold to unlock the great hall via the throne room
The great hall requires 6 expansion rooms and must be built aboveground
Greater mana salves grant a large amount of mana to one of your allies
Use gold to unlock greater mana salves in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 greater mana salves using the infirmary
Use 5 greater mana salves during battle
Mana salves grant a small amount of mana to one of your allies
Access Build Mode by clicking on the hammer icon
Use gold to unlock mana salves in the infirmary crafting menu
Greater injury kits grant a large amount of health to one of your allies
Use gold to unlock greater injury kits in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 greater injury kits using the infirmary
Use 5 greater injury kits during battle
Team injury kits grant a small amount of health to each of your allies
Use gold to unlock team injury kits in the infirmary crafting menu
Craft 10 team injury kits using the infirmary
Use 5 team injury kits during battle
